final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, themed around the GPT-5.5 launch, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-stakes China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy, presenter name, and event context
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, forward-looking atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with GP institutional finance meets cutting-edge AI — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5 发布" (large, primary title), "演讲人：Sam Altman" (secondary), "融资路演" (supporting label)
Constraints: must conform to China domestic GP roadshow / 路演 slide conventions — layout, hierarchy, and tone should read as credible to a Chinese LP/GP audience
Avoid:
